top_signals.title: Stocks Climb Before Nvidia’s Earnings as Oil Falls: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks rose as a decline in oil prices halted a selloff in bonds, with traders awaiting Nvidia Corp.’s results for clues on whether a tech-led surge from 2026 lows has more room to run.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US Crude Inventories Drop By Most on Record as Exports Surge
top_signals.summary: US crude inventories, including strategic reserves, plunged by a record 17.8 million barrels last week as record exports start to erode the domestic supply cushions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Barney Frank, US congressman, 1940-2026
top_signals.summary: First openly gay member of Congress led landmark banking reforms in wake of the financial crisis

top_signals.title: Authentic Brands Group expects IPO in next 12 months, founder tells CNBC
top_signals.summary: Authentic Brands Group, the firm behind Reebok and Champion, is bringing in a public company veteran as its next CEO, signaling it's readying for an IPO.
